# A11y UI

This is the documentation for the `@a11ypros/a11y-ui-components` package.
It contains accessible React components and implementation guidance for production teams.
Current package version: 2.1.1.

## Overview

- [Home](https://ui.a11ypros.com/): Accessibility-first React component library homepage.
- [Getting Started](https://ui.a11ypros.com/getting-started): Installation and first usage guide.
- [Components](https://ui.a11ypros.com/components): Component index with summaries and examples.
- [Accessibility Guide](https://ui.a11ypros.com/accessibility): Accessibility principles and testing guidance.

## Components

- [Accordion](https://ui.a11ypros.com/components/accordion): Collapsible panel patterns.
- [Button](https://ui.a11ypros.com/components/button): Action buttons with variants and states.
- [Checkbox](https://ui.a11ypros.com/components/checkbox): Boolean and consent controls.
- [Data Table](https://ui.a11ypros.com/components/table): Sortable tabular data and selection patterns.
- [Fieldset](https://ui.a11ypros.com/components/fieldset): Grouped form controls with legends.
- [Input](https://ui.a11ypros.com/components/input): Single-line text and email fields.
- [Label](https://ui.a11ypros.com/components/label): Labeling and form association patterns.
- [Link](https://ui.a11ypros.com/components/link): Navigation and utility link variants.
- [Modal](https://ui.a11ypros.com/components/modal): Focus-managed dialog and overlay patterns.
- [Radio](https://ui.a11ypros.com/components/radio): Mutually exclusive option groups.
- [Select](https://ui.a11ypros.com/components/select): Single-select dropdown patterns.
- [Tabs](https://ui.a11ypros.com/components/tabs): Keyboard-friendly tablist and panel patterns.
- [Textarea](https://ui.a11ypros.com/components/textarea): Multi-line text input patterns.

## Resources

- [Storybook](https://ui.a11ypros.com/storybook): Interactive playground and component states.
- [NPM Package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@a11ypros/a11y-ui-components): Package distribution and versions.
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/A11YPros/a11y-ui): Source code, issues, and contribution history.
- [Audit Tool](https://ui.a11ypros.com/audit): Accessibility audit interface.
